articles.title: Tesla (TSLA) Rolls Out Unsupervised Robotaxis in Austin Metro Area, Reuters Reports
articles.summary: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is expanding its unsupervised robotaxi service throughout the Austin Metro area, a move reported by Reuters in early June. This initiative is central to Tesla's growth strategy, which has pivoted towards AI and robotics, aiming to accelerate its autonomous ride-hailing operations. Additionally, Estonia's transport authority recently cleared Tesla's FSD driver-assistance system for use on its roads, though it remains a Level 2 system requiring driver responsibility.
articles.text_to_analyze: Tesla (TSLA) Rolls Out Unsupervised Robotaxis in Austin Metro Area, Reuters Reports. Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is expanding its unsupervised robotaxi service throughout the Austin Metro area, a move reported by Reuters in early June. This initiative is central to Tesla's growth strategy, which has pivoted towards AI and robotics, aiming to accelerate its autonomous ride-hailing operations. Additionally, Estonia's transport authority recently cleared Tesla's FSD driver-assistance system for use on its roads, though it remains a Level 2 system requiring driver responsibility.

articles.title: Yikes! Elon Musk's Robotaxi Fleet Is Smaller Than Pepsi's Doritos Truck Fleet
articles.summary: Despite Elon Musk's emphasis on autonomy, PepsiCo has a larger fleet of fully driverless trucks operating on public roads than Tesla's unsupervised robotaxi service, according to a recent Wall Street Journal report. PepsiCo's 41 driverless trucks, used for hauling snacks and beverages, have logged zero accidents and high on-time rates, while Tesla's robotaxi fleet is significantly smaller and faces skepticism from prediction markets regarding its future deployment. Tesla's market capitalization relies heavily on its autonomy thesis, but meaningful robotaxi fleet expansion and FSD software release are delayed.

articles.title: Tesla, Inc. $TSLA Shares Acquired by Focus Partners Advisor Solutions LLC
articles.summary: Focus Partners Advisor Solutions LLC significantly increased its stake in Tesla ($TSLA) by 10.1% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to $23.22 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the electric vehicle producer. The article also highlights recent positive and neutral news surrounding Tesla, including analyst ratings, price targets, and insider trading activities.

articles.title: Erste Asset Management GmbH Buys 26,829 Shares of Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
articles.summary: Erste Asset Management GmbH significantly increased its stake in Tesla, Inc. by 205.5% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 26,829 shares to hold a total of 39,883 shares valued at $18.3 million. This comes amidst other institutional investors also adjusting their positions in the electric vehicle producer. Various analysts have issued updated ratings and price objectives for Tesla, reflecting a mixed sentiment with positive notes on its "physical AI" potential and improving China sales, alongside concerns about its elevated valuation.

articles.title: Can Lemonade’s Indiana Tesla Discount Reveal the Real Scale of Its AI Edge (LMND)?
articles.summary: Lemonade, Inc. has introduced an Autonomous Car insurance discount for Tesla owners in Indiana, offering 50% off miles driven using Full Self-Driving (Supervised). This move underscores Lemonade's AI-driven pricing and product strategy, which is critical for its long-term profitability. Investors are watching to see if this and other product rollouts contribute to improved loss ratios, capital discipline, and ultimately, a path to better earnings amidst ongoing losses and regulatory risks.

articles.title: Tesla Stock Forecast | SpaceX Listing, Q1 Results
articles.summary: Tesla's stock performance and future outlook are influenced by several factors, including the upcoming SpaceX IPO, Tesla's Q1 2026 results which showed negative free cash flow due to increased AI and robotaxi infrastructure spending, and varying analyst price targets. Analysts are split on whether the SpaceX listing will benefit or detract from Tesla's capital flows, while the company's shift towards AI, autonomous driving, and robotics continues to be a key focus for investors and analysts. Despite a recent recovery, the stock remains below its December 2025 all-time high, with consensus price targets ranging from $404.37 to $419.94.

articles.title: TSLA Stock: Cathie Wood Slaps $75 Robotaxi Ticket Into ARK’s Bull Case
articles.summary: Cathie Wood of ARK Invest experienced an unsupervised Tesla Robotaxi ride in Austin, during which the vehicle received a $75 parking ticket. This incident led her to add a new line item for tickets to ARK's Tesla valuation model, though she maintains a bullish stance on Tesla's robotaxi potential, projecting it to drive a significant portion of the company's enterprise value. Despite ARK's optimism, Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) system faces ongoing investigation by the NHTSA for safety concerns and has been linked to several reportable incidents involving its Austin robotaxi fleet.

articles.title: JPMorgan Just Dramatically Reversed Course on Tesla Because TSLA Stock Has Massive Physical AI Potential
articles.summary: JPMorgan, a long-time skeptic of Tesla, has dramatically upgraded TSLA stock to "Neutral" from "Underweight" and increased its price target to $475 from $145. This reversal is primarily due to Tesla's leading position in "physical AI," encompassing self-driving cars, factory robots, and the Optimus humanoid robot. The bank highlights Tesla's manufacturing scale, vertical integration, and rapid technology development as unmatched strengths, although it acknowledges that near-term valuations are still high and significant returns are expected later in the decade.

articles.title: ASML Holding NV Stock (ASML) Moved Up by 7.15% on Jun 8: Key Drivers Unveiled
articles.summary: ASML Holding NV (ASML) stock surged 7.15% on June 8, driven by Elon Musk's endorsement and positive analyst revisions. Musk's mention of ASML as "arguably the greatest company in Europe" and its essential role in SpaceX and Tesla's Terafab project, which will rely on ASML's EUV lithography technology, significantly boosted market sentiment. Additionally, leading firms like BofA, JPMorgan, and Morgan Stanley raised price targets, maintaining "Buy" or "Overweight" recommendations, reflecting confidence in ASML's future prospects, strong Q1 2026 results, and increased 2026 revenue outlook due to high AI-driven demand.

articles.title: Tesla Inc Stock (TSLA) Moved Up by 3.38% on Jun 8: Drivers Behind the Movement
articles.summary: Tesla Inc. (TSLA) stock rose by 3.38% on June 8, driven by advances in autonomous driving, an analyst upgrade from JPMorgan, and improved market share. The company began rolling out its robotaxi service in Austin, expanded its Full Self-Driving software, and reclaimed the top spot in the global EV market share for Q1 2026. However, concerns about Cybertruck demand, intense competition, and high valuation persist.

articles.title: Google reportedly orders 3 million AI chips from Intel for 2028 production
articles.summary: Google has reportedly placed an order for over three million tensor processing units from Intel, intended for production in 2028. This move comes as Nvidia is also evaluating Intel's technology for a processor combining four graphics chips. Intel's shares saw a significant rise following this news, and Tesla CEO Elon Musk previously stated plans to use Intel's 14A manufacturing process for his Terafab project.

articles.title: Manchester Capital Management LLC Has $8.30 Million Stock Holdings in Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
articles.summary: Manchester Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Tesla, Inc. by 52.6% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 18,449 shares valued at $8.30 million. This investment now represents 1.1% of the firm's portfolio. Despite notable insider selling and a consensus "Hold" rating from Wall Street, analysts are considering Tesla's potential in AI, robotics, and robotaxis as long-term growth drivers.

articles.title: Google, Nvidia consider Intel as backup chip manufacturer, The Information reports
articles.summary: Alphabet's Google has reportedly placed an order with Intel to manufacture over three million tensor processing units by 2028. Nvidia is also evaluating Intel's technology for a processor combining four graphics chips. This news indicates a potential turnaround for Intel in chip manufacturing, with Tesla CEO Elon Musk also previously mentioning plans to use Intel's 14A manufacturing process for his company's AI chip complex.

articles.title: Autonomous & Self-Driving Vehicle News: WeRide, Uber, Zoox, Volvo Nuro, Lucid & Tesla.
articles.summary: This article provides updates on various autonomous and self-driving vehicle initiatives involving companies like WeRide, Uber, Zoox, Volvo Autonomous Solutions, Nuro, Lucid, and Tesla. Key developments include WeRide and Uber launching a robotaxi pilot in Madrid, Lockton and Nexar's new framework for AV risk assessment, and Uber's significant investment in Nuro for an autonomous Lucid vehicle fleet. Tesla is also highlighted for facing legal challenges regarding retroactive modifications to FSD purchase agreements.

articles.title: Weekend Round-Up: Foxconn's Rival, BYD's Sales Surge And Tesla's Potential Win In Canada
articles.summary: This article summarizes a busy week in the EV industry, highlighting Foxconn's new Cavira EV challenging Tesla's Model Y with greater range and interior space. It also covers BYD's surge in overseas sales, breaking a slump, and discusses Tesla's potential benefits from a Canada-China EV deal that could bring more Chinese-made EVs to Canada.

articles.title: WINTON GROUP Ltd Acquires New Stake in Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
articles.summary: WINTON GROUP Ltd has acquired a new stake in Tesla, Inc. by purchasing 11,934 shares valued at approximately $5.37 million in the fourth quarter. This move highlights continuing heavy institutional interest in Tesla, with 66.2% of the stock now held by institutional investors and hedge funds, despite some insider selling and a split consensus among analysts who currently rate the stock as "Hold" with an average target price of $404.37.

articles.title: 2026.8.300 Official Tesla Release Notes - Software Updates
articles.summary: Tesla has released update 2026.8.300, which includes several new features and improvements. Key updates include Dashcam Viewer improvements, visibility of the selected driver profile in the Tesla app, support for the Slovak language, and various enhancements to Service Mode. The update is currently rolling out to a small percentage of the fleet.

articles.title: Elon Musk to attend ASML tech conference to talk Terafab - Bloomberg
articles.summary: Elon Musk will virtually attend a closed-door technology conference hosted by ASML Holding NV to discuss his Terafab project. Terafab, a joint venture between SpaceX and Tesla, aims to produce cutting-edge chips for AI, robotics, and space data centers, with plans to build a $55 billion chip factory in the U.S. ASML, a crucial supplier for advanced chip manufacturing, considers Terafab a serious endeavor, recognizing Musk's ambition to significantly expand semiconductor production capacity beyond current industry limits.
